reference: I bumped my shin and at the time didn't think anything of it. Two days later, I noticed it was swollen. Three days later, the swelling has not noticeably gone down and there is some yellow bruising around it. It is not painful to the touch. Should I be concerned?
text: I bought my shirt and advertised that it was made of velvet. Two days later, I noticed it was wrong. Three days later, the sewing had not moved to be drawn down, and there was some yellow bleeding around it. It is not painful to the touch. Should I be concerned?
